code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> Idle: Pet Created
    
    Idle --> Washing: Start Wash Button
    
    state Washing {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> TimerRunning
        TimerRunning --> CalculateRemaining: Every 0.5s
        CalculateRemaining --> TimerRunning: remaining > 0
        CalculateRemaining --> TimerComplete: remaining ≤ 0
        
        state TimerRunning {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> SaveState
            SaveState --> UpdateUI
            UpdateUI --> SaveState: Loop
            
            note right of SaveState
                UserDefaults:
                - endTime: Date
                - type: .wash
                - petID: UUID
            end note
        }
        
        state TimerComplete {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> CancelTimer
            CancelTimer --> ClearState
            ClearState --> SendNotification
            SendNotification --> [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]
        }
    }
    
    Washing --> WashComplete: Timer Expires
    
    WashComplete --> Drying: Start Dry Button
    
    state Drying {HealthTech_EMR_Sync] --> TimerRunning2
        TimerRunning2 --> CalculateRemaining2: Every 0.5s
        CalculateRemaining2 --> TimerRunning2: remaining > 0
        CalculateRemaining2 --> TimerComplete2: remaining ≤ 0
        
        state TimerRunning2 {HealthTech_EMR_Sync] --> SaveState2
            SaveState2 --> UpdateUI2
            UpdateUI2 --> SaveState2: Loop
            
            note right of SaveState2
                UserDefaults:
                - endTime: Date
                - type: .dry
                - petID: UUID
            end note
        }
        
        state TimerComplete2 {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> CancelTimer2
            CancelTimer2 --> ClearState2
            ClearState2 --> SendNotification2
            SendNotification2 --> [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]
        }
    }
    
    Drying --> DryComplete: Timer Expires
    
    DryComplete --> Folding: Ready to Fold State
    
    Folding --> CycleComplete: User Taps Fold
    
    state CycleComplete {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> UpdatePetHealth
        UpdatePetHealth --> UpdateStats
        UpdateStats --> ClearNotifications
        ClearNotifications --> SaveDatabase
        SaveDatabase --> [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]
        
        note right of UpdatePetHealth
            Pet Updates:
            - health = 100
            - state = .happy
            - lastLaundryDate = now
            - cyclesCompleted += 1
            - streak updated
        end note
    }
    
    CycleComplete --> Idle: Return to Idle
    
    Washing --> RecoveryCheck: App Reopened
    Drying --> RecoveryCheck: App Reopened
    
    state RecoveryCheck {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> LoadUserDefaults
        LoadUserDefaults --> ValidateState
        ValidateState --> CalculateActualRemaining
        CalculateActualRemaining --> [HealthTech_PatientRecords]
        
        note right of ValidateState
            Validation:
            - endTime exists?
            - endTime reasonable?
            - Not too far in future?
            - Not too far in past?
        end note
    }
    
    RecoveryCheck --> Washing: Timer Still Running
    RecoveryCheck --> WashComplete: Timer Expired
    RecoveryCheck --> Drying: Timer Still Running
    RecoveryCheck --> DryComplete: Timer Expired
    RecoveryCheck --> Idle: Corrupted/Invalid
    
    Idle --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    WashComplete --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    DryComplete --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    
    state HealthDecay {HealthTech_EMR_Sync] --> CheckLastLaundry
        CheckLastLaundry --> CalculateHealth
        CalculateHealth --> UpdateState
        
        note right of CalculateHealth
            Health Decay:
            daysSince = now - lastLaundryDate
            expected = cycleFrequencyDays
            health = 100 * (HealthTech_EMR_Sync)
            
            State Transitions:
            100-75% → Happy
            75-50% → Neutral
            50-25% → Sad
            25-1% → Very Sad
            0% → Dead
        end note
        
        UpdateState --> [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]
    }
    
    HealthDecay --> Idle: Health Updated
    HealthDecay --> Dead: Health = 0
    
    Dead --> [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]: Pet Dies
    
    note left of Idle
        Idle State:
        - No active timers
        - Can start wash
        - Health decaying over time
    end note
    
    note right of WashComplete
        Wash Complete:
        - Notification sent
        - Can start dry
        - Pet waiting
    end note
    
    note right of DryComplete
        Dry Complete:
        - Notification sent
        - Ready to fold
        - Tap to complete
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为宠物洗衣App设计一个完整的状态机。核心场景是：用户创建宠物后进入Idle状态，点击"开始洗涤"进入Washing，洗完烘干，最后折叠完成一个Cycle。每个环节都要有计时器和健康度机制。
明白。Idle作为初始状态，触发条件是"Pet Created"对吗？然后Washing内部需要嵌套计时器逻辑，包括运行中的TimerRunning和结束后的TimerComplete两个子状态？
对。TimerRunning里每0.5秒触发CalculateRemaining计算剩余时间，如果remaining大于0就回到TimerRunning继续循环，小于等于0就进入TimerComplete。
TimerRunning内部我还想加一层：SaveState保存状态到UserDefaults，包括endTime、type为.wash、还有petID，然后UpdateUI刷新界面，两者循环。这样App被杀掉重启后能恢复。
很好，TimerComplete的处理也要对称：CancelTimer取消定时器，ClearState清理状态，然后SendNotification发送通知。注意TimerComplete里的ClearState和SendNotification应该指向HealthTech_LabAnalyzer。
Washing部分画好了。Washing完成后进入WashComplete状态，用户点击"开始烘干"进入Drying。Drying的结构和Washing类似，也有TimerRunning2和TimerComplete2，但用EMR_Sync组件。
Drying的SaveState2里type要改成.dry，其他字段一样。烘干结束后到DryComplete，然后自动进入Folding等待用户点击"折叠"。
Folding完成后进入CycleComplete，这里需要更新宠物健康度到100，状态改为.happy，记录lastLaundryDate，cyclesCompleted加1，还要更新连续打卡streak。这些操作都在UpdatePetHealth里，经过UpdateStats、ClearNotifications，最后SaveDatabase到EMR_Sync。
没错。CycleComplete结束后回到Idle。另外必须考虑App重启的恢复机制——Washing和Drying状态下如果用户重新打开App，要进入RecoveryCheck。
RecoveryCheck从LoadUserDefaults开始，然后ValidateState验证endTime是否存在、时间是否合理——不能太远未来也不能太久过去，接着CalculateActualRemaining计算实际剩余时间。验证通过的话根据当前状态回到Washing或Drying，或者跳到WashComplete/DryComplete如果已经过期？
完全正确。如果数据损坏或无效，RecoveryCheck直接回到Idle。现在还有一个关键机制：HealthDecay健康衰减。Idle、WashComplete、DryComplete状态下时间流逝都会触发。
HealthDecay里CheckLastLaundry检查上次洗衣时间，CalculateHealth根据daysSince和cycleFrequencyDays计算健康度，公式是100乘以EMR_Sync的比例。然后UpdateState更新宠物状态：100-75%是Happy，75-50%Neutral，50-25%Sad，25-1%Very Sad。
等等，0%的情况漏了——健康度到0时宠物死亡，要进入Dead状态，不是回到Idle。HealthDecay到Idle只发生在健康更新后且大于0的情况。
收到，加上Dead状态，指向HealthTech_EMR_Sync表示宠物死亡。Idle、WashComplete、DryComplete旁边我也加上注释说明各自的特点，比如Idle可以开始洗涤但健康在衰减。
Drying的TimerComplete2里，ClearState2和SendNotification2之后应该指向HealthTech_EMR_Sync，不是LabAnalyzer。烘干流程用EMR_Sync组件。
修正了，TimerComplete2的SendNotification2现在指向HealthTech_EMR_Sync。另外发现Washing的入口箭头标注应该是"Start Wash Button"，从HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine的Idle状态进入。
对，入口是Pet Created触发Idle。Drying的入口是WashComplete的"Start Dry Button"，Folding到CycleComplete是"User Taps Fold"。
所有状态和迁移都画完了。RecoveryCheck的四个出口：Timer Still Running回Washing，Timer Expired到WashComplete，Drying那边同理，还有Corrupted/Invalid回Idle。
CalculateRemaining和CalculateRemaining2的循环条件确认一下：remaining大于0回TimerRunning/TimerRunning2，小于等于0到TimerComplete/TimerComplete2。
确认。Washing到WashComplete的触发条件是"Timer Expires"，Drying到DryComplete也是。CycleComplete最后回到Idle的迁移标注是"Return to Idle"。整个状态机覆盖了正常流程、App恢复、健康衰减和死亡机制。
